case_title: PETER ENGLANDER VS. HILLSDALE FURNITURE LLC et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENGLANDER, PETER SERVED OCT-18-2013, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT, ACKNOWLEDGMENT DATE NOV-07-2013 AS TO DEFENDANT HILLSDALE FURNITURE LLC
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENGLANDER, PETER

AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT, MEMO OF P&A, DEC OF BRIAN JOHNSON, DEC RE: COMPLIANCE WITH CAL. CODE REGS., TIT. 11 SEC 3000 ET SEQ., PROPOSED ORDER, PROPOSED JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENGLANDER, PETER

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROP 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE MOTION COMPLIES WITH THE HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER AND SEPARATE FORM OF JUDGMENT.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.
NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO APPROVE PROP 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENGLANDER, PETER HEARING SET FOR MAY-01-2014 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO APPROVE PROP 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT CONTINUED FROM MAY-01-2014 TO LAW AND MOTION AT JUN-12-2014, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 PER STIPULATION OF COUNSEL.
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENGLANDER, PETER

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER AND DEFENDANT HILLSDALE FURNITURE LLC, HAVING AGREED THROUGH THEIR RESPECTIVE COUNSEL THAT JUDGMENT BE ENTERED PURSUANT TO THE TERMS OF THEIR SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN THE FORM OF A CONSENT JUDGMENT, AND FOLLOWING THIS COURT'S ISSUANCE OF AN ORDER APPROVING THEIR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT. IT IS HEREBY ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED THAT, PURSUANT TO HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7(F)(4) AND CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 664.6, JUDGMENT IS HEREBY ENTERED IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE TERMS OF THE CONSENT JUDGMENT ATTACHED HERETO AS EXHIBIT 1. BY STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES, THE COURT WILL RETAIN JURISDICTION TO ENFORCE THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 664.6. (SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL ON JULY 25, 2014 OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER APPROVING PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENGLANDER, PETER
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-06-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-12-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER'S Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is granted. The motion complies with the Health and Safety Code. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and separate form of judgment.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-24-2014 Continued To Jun-12-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Off Calendar Feb-28-2014 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-06-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
